name: yaho1_loop
note: RESCENE 'Geoje yaho' meme pose, 14-frame complete sequence played as a loop (0-2 wind-up inhale with hands cupped around mouth, 3-5 the big 'yaho~!' shout, 6-8 transition into the gyaru pose, 9-11 signature pose held: wink + upside-down V sign next to her cheek + hand on hip, 12-13 relax back toward neutral so the loop restarts cleanly). Key pose geometry: the V peace sign is INVERTED — index and middle finger extended but pointing DOWNWARD, back of her hand toward the viewer, held right beside her cheekbone under the winking eye. She keeps her own lemon outfit (no costume change). Feet stay close together under her hips in every frame, no jumping. Frame wording uses IMAGE-side directions (viewer's left/right).
frames: Pose: standing upright with her feet close together under her hips, both open hands rising in front of her chest, palms loosely cupped and facing each other, elbows bending as the hands travel up toward her mouth. Eyes wide and sparkling with excitement, mouth opening into an eager grin, cheeks flushed. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: standing with feet close together, leaning back very slightly from the waist, both hands cupped around the sides of her mouth like a small megaphone, elbows out to the sides, chest lifting as she inhales deeply, shoulders rising. Eyes squeezed shut in happy anticipation, cheeks puffed with the big breath. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: full wind-up before a big shout: leaning back a little more from the waist, chin tucked, both hands firmly cupped around her mouth megaphone-style, elbows wide, chest puffed up with air, heels together, knees straight. Eyes still squeezed shut, eyebrows raised, cheeks fully puffed. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the shout begins: body tipping forward from the waist, both hands still cupped around her mouth like a megaphone, mouth opening WIDE in a joyful shout, eyes popping open bright and happy, hair starting to flutter from the motion, feet close together, heels still on the ground. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: peak of the shout 'yaho~!': leaning forward from the waist, rising onto her tiptoes, both hands cupped around her wide-open shouting mouth, eyes squeezed into happy upturned arcs, blonde hair flying up and back, a few tiny star sparkles bursting beside her head, skirt fluttering. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: second beat of the shout: body bouncing back up a little straighter, heels settling toward the floor, both hands still cupped at her mouth, mouth still wide open in a huge joyful shout, eyes open and shining, hair settling. Feet close together under her hips. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the shout is finished and she is straightening upright: her mouth closing into a wide cheeky grin. Her hands are leaving her mouth — the hand on the LEFT side of the image is dropping down toward her hip, while the hand on the RIGHT side of the image stays up near her cheek with the index and middle fingers starting to extend into a V shape. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: settling into a gyaru idol pose: the hand on the LEFT side of the image lands on her hip with the elbow pushed out, while the hand on the RIGHT side of the image hovers beside her cheek making a V peace sign that is rotating so the two extended fingers point DOWNWARD, back of the hand turning toward the viewer. Her hip starts to push out toward the LEFT side of the image, one eye beginning to close into a wink, big playful grin. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: gyaru pose almost locked: one hand planted on her hip on the LEFT side of the image with the elbow out, and on the RIGHT side of the image an UPSIDE-DOWN V peace sign — index and middle finger extended and pointing straight DOWN, other fingers curled, back of her hand toward the viewer — held right next to her cheekbone just under her eye. She is winking the eye on the RIGHT side of the image, the other eye open and sparkling, huge cheeky open-mouth grin. Hip pushed out toward the LEFT side of the image, feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: signature pose HELD, key frame: confident gyaru idol pose — one hand on her hip on the LEFT side of the image, elbow out, hip cocked toward the LEFT side of the image; beside her cheek on the RIGHT side of the image an UPSIDE-DOWN V peace sign, the two extended fingers pointing straight DOWN, back of the hand toward the viewer, held just under her winking eye. Winking the eye on the RIGHT side of the image, tongue peeking playfully from the corner of her huge grin, cheeks flushed, a few tiny star sparkles around her head. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the exact same gyaru pose with a tiny rhythmic bounce DOWN: knees softening slightly so the whole body sits a touch lower, head tilting a little toward the RIGHT side of the image toward her V-sign hand. Same pose otherwise: hand on hip on the LEFT side of the image, upside-down V sign (fingers pointing DOWN, back of hand to viewer) beside her cheek on the RIGHT side of the image, wink on the RIGHT-image eye, huge cheeky grin, sparkles twinkling. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the same gyaru pose bouncing back UP: knees straightening, body a touch taller, head returning toward center. Hand still on her hip on the LEFT side of the image, upside-down V sign still beside her cheek on the RIGHT side of the image with fingers pointing DOWN, still winking the RIGHT-image eye, grin at its biggest, sparkles fading. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the pose relaxing: the winking eye reopening so both eyes are open and happy, the V-sign hand lowering from her cheek down to shoulder height with the fingers relaxing open, the other hand leaving her hip, hip straightening back to center. Warm satisfied smile. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: returning to a relaxed neutral stand: both arms lowering to rest naturally at her sides, hands open and relaxed, body fully upright, feet close together under her hips, shoulders settling. Leftover happy grin softening into a content smile, eyes bright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
